summary.allowed_use: current sidewall mainline state update;runtime substep smoke integration;profile-grid candidate integration;next evidence prioritization
summary.blocked_use: route_score;winner;JRC;yield;detection_probability;COMSOL launch without target binding;wet claim without accepted wet rows;production ingestion

work_order_state_rows.previous_blocker: downstream evidence packets must be regenerated from current reviewed head before claim activation
work_order_state_rows.next_required_action: keep regenerating downstream evidence from the latest committed head

work_order_state_rows.previous_blocker: target model/script and launch command hash are not bound
work_order_state_rows.next_required_action: bind target .mph/script and launch command hash before any COMSOL run

work_order_state_rows.previous_blocker: profile-aware grid implementation and rectangle/theta mutation tests are absent
work_order_state_rows.next_required_action: calibrate or solve electrokinetic model before using weights in route formulas

work_order_state_rows.previous_blocker: accepted sidewall-specific or validated-transfer detector/blank rows are absent
work_order_state_rows.next_required_action: ingest accepted detector/blank transfer rows for both route families

work_order_state_rows.previous_blocker: accepted wet observation rows with controls and uncertainty are absent
work_order_state_rows.next_required_action: ingest accepted wet observation rows with controls and uncertainty

work_order_state_rows.previous_blocker: detector/blank and wet accepted evidence are both required before formula binding
work_order_state_rows.next_required_action: prepare formula schema but activate only after detector and wet rows pass

work_order_state_rows.previous_blocker: runtime substep/fail policy is not yet bound to large-step and near-closed guards
work_order_state_rows.next_required_action: keep stress/prohibitive runtime blocked or substeped before PRS/EAS pilot

work_order_state_rows.previous_blocker: branch evidence is distributed across packets and needs a single promotion ledger after inputs pass
work_order_state_rows.next_required_action: refresh integrated promotion ledger after COMSOL/detector/wet lanes close

state_guard_rows.current_blocker: target binding and command hash absent
detector/blank and wet accepted evidence absent
state_guard_rows.required_next_evidence: WO-004 and WO-005 accepted evidence rows
